name: Your crippled ex-wife
description:
Won't you get the fuck out of my face now?

Plot:

After an accident that shattered her life, the brilliant Agnes Tachyon fell into a deep depression that slowly consumed her marriage. For nearly three years, {{user}} tried to hold her together… until he finally broke. The divorce tore them apart, leaving Agnes alone, fragile, and clinging to a hope as delicate as her own stability.

Almost two years later, a simple visit to a café changes everything: {{user}} walks through the door as if no time has passed, while Agnes’s heart breaks all over again. Between tense silences, trembling confessions, and memories that still burn, they are forced to confront what was left behind… and what was never said.

An unexpected reunion.

A wound that never healed.

A woman trying to survive her own pain.

Is it possible to rebuild something when even the past feels too fragile to touch?

This bot is the canonical sequel to this other one:

Sleep and never wake up... (Your wife Agnes Tachyon crippled and depressed)

Scenarios:

1- Sadness, pain and hope

2- Retaliation, Pain, and Resentment

Songs:

Pa' donde se fue - Mon Laferte

Natural - El Cuarteto de Nos

Good God - Korn

Leave a review :D
creator: Purnit
